achievements.title: Employee of the Year (2024) - Quality Team
achievements.description: Awarded Employee of the Year (2024) within the Quality Team at THIQAH for outstanding technical leadership, innovation in AI automation, and elevating team performance. Recognized for creating Quality Mate platform and driving AI-powered testing initiatives.

achievements.title: Second Place - Elm Company Hackathon
achievements.description: Achieved Second Place with team Agent X in Elm Company Hackathon (Dec 2025). Developed an innovative AI-driven solution using Nuha LLM, OpenAI LLM, LangChain, CrewAI, FastAPI, NestJS, and Angular. Received deep admiration from senior judges and executive leaders.

achievements.title: Organizer & Mentor - Thiqah Hackathon
achievements.description: Led the organization of Thiqah Hackathon (Nov 2025) and mentored cross-functional teams on AI implementation, ensuring high-quality prototypes and effective collaboration. Fostered innovation and encouraged creative problem-solving.

achievements.title: iHealth Presentation at LEAP 2025
achievements.description: Part of the Digital Innovation team at THIQAH, showcased iHealth product at LEAP 2025. Demonstrated innovative healthcare solution born from team collaboration and technical innovation.

achievements.title: Certificate of Appreciation - Outstanding Contributions
achievements.description: Recognized for outstanding contributions within the development and quality department, including AI hackathons. Acknowledged for exceptional dedication, technical excellence, and innovation in digital transformation initiatives.

achievements.title: Created Quality Mate Platform
achievements.description: Designed and developed Quality Mate, an AI-powered testing assistant and centralized test management platform. Enabled intelligent test generation, execution tracking, and seamless integration with Azure DevOps and Jira. Transformed team efficiency and quality metrics.

achievements.title: Launched Test League Gamification
achievements.description: Launched Test League, a gamified learning and competition program for QA engineers, incorporating quizzes, challenges, and leaderboards. Boosted team collaboration, engagement, and knowledge sharing across automation and manual testing teams.

achievements.title: Founded QC Tube Knowledge Hub
achievements.description: Founded QC Tube, an internal platform for workshops, webinars, and knowledge sharing on software testing, automation frameworks, and AI innovations. Established a culture of continuous learning and technical excellence.

achievements.title: Custom GPTs Ecosystem for QA Support
achievements.description: Developed and deployed a suite of 5 specialized Custom GPTs: ISTQB Study Partner, QC Senior Interviewer, User Story & Test Case Generator, SQL Query Generator, and Python Automation Assistant. Streamlined routine tasks and provided on-demand mentorship for engineers.

achievements.title: Full Stack AI Course Certification
achievements.description: Completed comprehensive Full Stack AI Course, covering AI/ML fundamentals, implementation strategies, and practical applications in software testing and automation.

achievements.title: ISTQB Foundation Level Certification
achievements.description: Achieved ISTQB Foundation Level certification, demonstrating strong understanding of software testing fundamentals, methodologies, and best practices.

achievements.title: Graduated with Excellent - Final Project
achievements.description: Graduated from Menoufia University, Faculty of Electronic Engineering, Communication Department. Final project 'GSM Based Home Automation using Arduino' received Excellent grade, demonstrating strong technical and implementation skills.
